meta.title: How It Works, Elevate Agency
meta.description: Four steps to more gigs. No managers, no gatekeeping, no upfront cost, just a clear path from your bedroom decks to a packed room. For DJs and for venues.
meta.ogDescription: Four steps to more gigs. No managers, no gatekeeping, no upfront cost.

hero.headline:
four steps to
more gigs.
hero.lede: No managers, no gatekeeping, no upfront cost. Just a clear path from your bedroom decks to a packed room.

steps.title: Send your sound
steps.body: Drop us a mix, a SoundCloud link or a couple of tracks. We want to hear how you read a floor, not your follower count. One message is all it takes to get on our radar.

steps.title: We pitch you
steps.body: We take your sound to the right rooms, the clubs, bars, festivals and brand events that actually fit your style. No spraying you at every open-decks night; the right slot, to the right crowd.

steps.title: You play
steps.body: You show up and do what you do. We handle the booking, the brief and the promoter relationship so you can focus on the set. Real rooms, real crowds, real momentum.

steps.title: You grow
steps.body: Every gig builds the next one. We only earn when you get paid, so we're backing your come-up the whole way, from first support slot to your own headline night.

cards.label: No upfront fees
cards.title: Aligned with you
cards.body: We only earn when you get paid. Your come-up isn't a cost.

cards.label: Coast-grown
cards.title: We know the rooms
cards.body: Built on the Sunshine Coast, for the people who actually play it.

cards.label: Real rooms
cards.title: Bookings that matter
cards.body: Clubs, bars, festivals and brand events, not just open decks.

panels.title: I'm a DJ
panels.body: Coast-grown, touring out. Get on the roster and let us turn your sound into a calendar full of real gigs.

panels.title: I run a venue
panels.body: Need the right act for the right night? Tell us the room and the vibe, we'll match you with talent that moves your floor.

cta.heading: your come-up starts here.
cta.body: Send your sound. We'll do the rest. No spam, just a reply from a real person.
